mainEntity.name: Cost of ignoring Google AI Overviews for Houston firms?
mainEntity.text: Cost of ignoring Google AI Overviews for Houston firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Houston firms ignoring AI Overviews lose 78% high-intent visibility to cited competitors, reducing qualified leads by 30-50%.

suggestedAnswer.text: Opportunity cost high in consumer law; invest modestly to compete. Houston's growth amplifies losses.

name: Cost of Skipping Houston AI Overviews
